<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("All objects:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'G', 'c', 'B', 'W'):
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")
        for cid in n['children']:
            c = next(x for x in seg if x['id'] == cid)
            print(f"    child: color={c['color']}, boundary={c['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
